feed.title: Michael Dearman - Web & Game Developer
feed.subtitle: A pun-loving programmer based in London that specializes in WordPress and video game development.

entry.title: My First Post!
entry.content:
Hello all, welcome! This is my very first blog post, on my brand new website! Huzzah!

I’ll use this blog as a place to give updates on my upcoming projects, provide tutorials on various subjects and just general musings.
entry.summary: Hello all, welcome! This is my very first blog post, on my brand new website! Huzzah!
